data.name: 為戰敗的母豬騎士賦予詛咒!
data.detailed_description:
曾經的痴女騎士，在與同伴完成懸賞任務的途中，誤入了一座神秘的洞窟。

然而在那裡等待她的，卻是哥布林早已設下的埋伏！

昔日只存在於下流幻想中的惡夢，如今化為殘酷的現實。

她被囚禁在哥布林的洞窟中，身上烙下詛咒的淫紋！

她的未來，究竟是淪為繁殖的苗床，還是能奮力逃出生天……

這一切，只有你能親眼見證。

▍角色介紹

艾蓮娜・萊茵哈特(Elena Reinhardt)

本作的主角，同時也是王國名門貴族的千金。

是一名聖騎士，防禦力超群，但攻擊幾乎完全打不中敵人。

內心是極度重度受虐狂，對「被蹂躪」之類的妄想相當沉迷。

春馬（Haruma）

一名原本生活在現代的家裡蹲高中生，因一次意外死亡而被女神帶到異世界。

雖然沒有特別強大的能力，但善於利用道具、環境與小聰明取勝。

性格現實又有點小心眼，卻也是隊伍中最理智的人。

米蕾雅（Mirea）

帶著春馬來到異世界的女神。

擁有強力的回復與淨化能力，但是戰鬥能力趨近於零。

格性天然，常常做出脫線行為，卻也是隊伍不可或缺的治療角色。

▍遊戲特色

這是一款輕鬆簡單的脫逃遊戲。

玩家將深入危險的哥布林巢穴，探索其中的秘密，並設法找到逃出生天的途徑。

遊戲中沒有繁瑣的戰鬥設計，讓你能無負擔地專注於刺激的情色劇情體驗。

data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Curse upon the Defeated Sow Knight!
data.detailed_description:
Once a lustful knight, she and her companions strayed into a mysterious cave while completing a bounty mission.

But what awaited her there was a goblin ambush already lying in wait!

What was once nothing more than a filthy fantasy has now become a cruel reality.

Captured in the goblins’ lair and branded with a cursed lewd mark,

her fate now hangs in the balance—will she fall as nothing more than a breeding vessel,

or struggle to escape with her life?

Only you will be able to witness the outcome.

▍Characters

Elena Reinhardt

The protagonist of this story and the daughter of a prestigious noble family in the kingdom.

As a holy knight, her defensive abilities are unmatched, but her attacks almost never land on enemies.

Beneath her noble exterior lies a deep masochistic nature, obsessively indulging in fantasies of being "violated."

Haruma

A modern-day shut-in high school student who, after a sudden accidental death, was brought to the other world by a goddess.

Though he lacks any overwhelming powers, he excels at using tools, the environment, and quick wit to gain the upper hand.

Realistic and a bit petty at times, he nonetheless serves as the most rational member of the party.

Mirea

The goddess who brought Haruma into the other world.

She possesses powerful healing and purification abilities, but her combat power is close to zero.

With her airheaded personality, she often acts unpredictably, yet she remains an indispensable healer for the team.

▍Features

This is a simple and easy-to-play escape game.

Players will venture deep into the dangerous goblin lair, uncover its secrets, and search for a way to escape alive.

With no tedious battle mechanism, you can fully enjoy the thrilling and erotic story without any distractions.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel® Core™2 Duo
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel® Core™2 Duo
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
